title: Peppery American Mocha
description: A rich and invigorating mocha recipe combining peppery notes with American-style coffee.
instructions: 1. Brew a cup of American coffee.
2. In a separate saucepan, combine peppery chocolate and water over medium heat, whisking until smooth.
3. Add sugar and cocoa powder to the saucepan, whisking until combined.
4. Pour the chocolate mixture into a large mug.
5. Add brewed coffee to the mug, whisking until combined.
6. Add milk to the mug, whisking until frothy.
7. Top with whipped cream or chocolate shavings, if desired.
